headline: Editorial: Discover’s takeover by Capital One is costing Chicagoland loads of really good jobs
summary: When the news broke two years ago that locally based credit card company Discover Financial Services had agreed to be acquired by out-of-town rival Capital One, this page declared that, company reassurances to the contrary, little good would come of this tie-up for our region. We’re sorry to report that we may have underestimated the damage. McLean, Virginia-based Capital One is laying off ...
